name: xef-scale
description: Korean household expense tracker - financial data OS. Query transaction data, monthly/yearly summaries, and category breakdowns.

tools.name: list_transactions
tools.description: List expense transactions with optional filters (year, month, category, institution, search query). Returns paginated results.

q.description: Search by merchant name or notes

tools.name: get_transaction
tools.description: Get a single transaction by ID

tools.name: monthly_summary
tools.description: Get monthly spending summary with category breakdown. Shows total spending, transaction count, daily average, and per-category totals.

tools.name: yearly_summary
tools.description: Get yearly spending summary with monthly breakdown. Shows annual total, monthly average, and per-month totals.

authentication.description: API key from xef-scale Settings > API Keys. Pass as Authorization: Bearer <api_key>
